multica.buildCommand: export NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=1536 && pnpm canvas:a2ui:bundle && node scripts/tsdown-build.mjs && node scripts/runtime-postbuild.mjs && node scripts/build-stamp.mjs && node --import tsx scripts/canvas-a2ui-copy.ts && node --import tsx scripts/copy-hook-metadata.ts && node --import tsx scripts/copy-export-html-templates.ts && node --import tsx scripts/write-build-info.ts && node --import tsx scripts/write-cli-startup-metadata.ts && node --import tsx scripts/write-cli-compat.ts
